description: Store, categorise, and manage fleet vehicle documents — permits, roadworthiness certificates, registration papers, inspection reports, photos — with expiry tracking and renewal reminders.

actors.name: Fleet Manager
actors.description: Uploads documents, categorises them, and manages renewal actions

actors.name: Driver
actors.description: May upload photos or scan documents in the field via mobile

actors.name: System
actors.description: Monitors expiry dates and triggers renewal reminders

values.name: expiring_soon
values.description: Document is within the renewal reminder window

values.name: superseded
values.description: Document has been replaced by a newer version

values.name: archived
values.description: Document is no longer active but retained for historical records

transitions.description: Expiry date falls within the configured reminder window
New document uploaded before expiry; old record superseded
Expiry date passed without a replacement being uploaded
Late renewal — new document uploaded and validated
Newer version of the same document uploaded

file_required.description: File attachment is mandatory — a document record without a file is invalid

expiry_after_issue.description: If expiry_date is provided it must be after issue_date

auto_supersede_on_upload.description: When a new document of the same type is uploaded for the same vehicle, the previous record is automatically set to superseded

auto_expire_daily.description: Documents with expiry_date less than today are automatically transitioned to expired by the daily system job

compliance_blocks_dispatch.description: Expired compliance documents (roadworthiness, operating_permit) block vehicle dispatch until replaced

photos_no_expiry.description: Photos do not require expiry dates and are not subject to renewal reminders

archived_readonly.description: Archived documents are read-only but remain retrievable for audits

given: expiry_date is after issue_date if both provided

then.description: If another active document of the same type exists, mark it superseded

document_uploaded.result: Document is stored and the vehicle's document register is updated; previous version is superseded

given: days until expiry_date is less than or equal to configured advance_notice_days

then.description: Send expiry reminder to fleet manager

expiry_reminder_triggered.result: Fleet manager is notified that the document requires renewal

given: status is not archived, superseded, or active with a current replacement

then.description: Send overdue alert to fleet manager

document_expired.result: Document is marked expired; compliance-critical document types block vehicle dispatch

document_archived.result: Document is archived and no longer included in active document counts

invalid_file_rejected.result: Document record is rejected; a file attachment is mandatory

errors.message: A file attachment is required to save a document record.
Document expiry date must be after the issue date.
This vehicle has an expired compliance document. Renew it before dispatching the vehicle.

events.name: vehicle_document.uploaded
events.description: A document has been uploaded and stored against a vehicle record

events.name: vehicle_document.expiring_soon
events.description: A vehicle document is within the renewal reminder window

events.name: vehicle_document.expired
events.description: A vehicle document has passed its expiry date without renewal

events.name: vehicle_document.archived
events.description: A vehicle document has been manually archived

related.reason: Registration certificates are the primary document type managed for each vehicle
Document expiry dates feed the centralised renewal reminder system
Insurance certificates are stored as documents in the vehicle document register
